Event_Description: Alex is a small-animal veterinarian running day-to-day clinical practice across a broad caseload — dogs, cats, and exotics. He is the head clinician of the pet hospital and teahches technics to his techs. Alex takes his work very seriously and documents cases photographically and reasons carefully through species-specific care. He is aalso a caring cat owner and a big fan of snacks.
core_event: Alex moves through a full spectrum of cases — a parvovirus puppy, a blocked cat needing a urinary catheter, an oxygen-dependent budgie, a dehydrated bearded dragon, a car-struck stray kitten, post-operative complications, and surgical foreign-body and laceration management — interleaved with hard owner conversations about treatment costs and end-of-life decisions while teaching and caring for his techs and assistants, closing with a reflective gratitude for the rewarding moments amid the difficulty.

Event_Description: Alex examines a lethargic puppy suspected of canine parvovirus.
Query_Description: Alex shares photos of the puppy and asks how to treat a puppy with parvovirus.
Keyword: lethargic puppy with parvo suspicion at veterinary clinic

Event_Description: A blocked cat presents; Alex places a urinary catheter.
Query_Description: Alex shares photos of the blocked cat and asks how to maintain hydration and how to treat feline urinary obstruction.
Keyword: cat with urinary obstruction under treatment

Event_Description: A rabbit with gastrointestinal stasis is seen; Alex administers medications.
